# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This repository is based on the StackBlitz core project. Please follow these guidelines when working with this codebase.

## General Guidelines
- Follow modern JavaScript/TypeScript best practices
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
- Ensure all code changes are minimal and focused
- Test changes thoroughly before committing

## Code Style
- Use consistent indentation (2 or 4 spaces based on existing files)
- Follow naming conventions used in the existing codebase
- Add comments for complex logic
- Keep functions small and focused on a single responsibility

## Security
- Never commit secrets, API keys, or sensitive credentials
- Validate all user inputs
- Follow security best practices for web applications
- Use HTTPS for all external connections

## Testing
- Write tests for new features and bug fixes
- Ensure existing tests pass before committing changes
- Aim for good test coverage
- Use appropriate testing frameworks for the project

## Documentation
- Update documentation when changing functionality
- Add JSDoc/TSDoc comments for public APIs
- Keep README.md up to date
- Document any breaking changes

## Git Workflow
- Write clear, descriptive commit messages
- Keep commits focused and atomic
- Reference issue numbers in commits when applicable
- Follow semantic versioning for releases

## Dependencies
- Only add dependencies when necessary
- Keep dependencies up to date
- Document why new dependencies are needed
- Prefer well-maintained packages with good security records

## Performance
- Optimize for performance where appropriate
- Avoid unnecessary computations
- Use efficient algorithms and data structures
- Profile code when performance is critical
